feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Process Integration
feed.subtitle: SAP Process Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Content Modifier XPATH IDOC
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have a IDoc XML being received through IDoc adapter and I tried to read the value of MESTYP using ContentModifier but the value is always coming as empty. I tried both header and property section like

MESTYP - //EDI_DC40/MESTYP (XPATH)

Any idea?

IDoc XML:

<FLOC01 xmlns="urn:sap-com:document:sap:idoc:soap:messages">
  <IDOC BEGIN="1">
    <EDI_DC40 SEGMENT="1">
      <TABNAM>EDI_DC40</TABNAM>
      <MANDT>XXX</MANDT>
      <DOCNUM>0000000000001278</DOCNUM>
      <DOCREL>XXX</DOCREL>
      <STATUS>XX</STATUS>
      <DIRECT>X</DIRECT>
      <OUTMOD>X</OUTMOD>
      <IDOCTYP>FLOCXX</IDOCTYP>
      <MESTYP>FLOCX</MESTYP>
      <STDMES>/EVISX</STDMES>
      <SNDPOR>SAPXXXX</SNDPOR>
      <SNDPRT>XX</SNDPRT>
      <SNDPRN>XXXXXXXXX</SNDPRN>
      <RCVPOR>XXXX_XXX</RCVPOR>
      <RCVPRT>XX</RCVPRT>
      <RCVPRN>XXXXXXXXX</RCVPRN>
      <CREDAT>YYYYMMDD</CREDAT>
      <CRETIM>HHMMSS</CRETIM>
      <ARCKEY>urn:sap.com:msgid=XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX</ARCKEY>
      <SERIAL>YYYYMMDDHHMMSS</SERIAL>
    </EDI_DC40>
    <FLOC_HDR SEGMENT="1">
      <ACTION>X</ACTION>
      <TPLNR>XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX</TPLNR>
      <STRNO>XX.XX.XXXX.XXXX.XX-XXX-XXX</STRNO>
      <TPLMA>XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX</TPLMA>
      <TPLMA_L>XX.XX.XXXX.XXXX</TPLMA_L>
      <PLTXT>ITEM DESCRIPTION</PLTXT>
      <EQART>XX-XXXX</EQART>
      <BUKRS>XXXX</BUKRS>
      <IWERK>XXXX</IWERK>
      <SWERK>XXXX</SWERK>
      <EQFNR>XX-XXX-XXX</EQFNR>
      <KOSTL>XXXXXXXXXX</KOSTL>
      <STORT>XX-XXX</STORT>
    </FLOC_HDR>
  </IDOC>
</FLOC01>

entry.title: PI - dynamic filename for SFTP to SFTP scenario using a UDF
Intrastat Intercompany Scenario SAP S4 Help Needed
entry.content: IF we are creating Sales order in Italy sales area and the intercompany plant is from Germany Sales Org .The intercompany document is created for company code for Swiss  . When we created provider information the below intercompany document is not showing when we run VE01 T-code . The Information provider creation which we are doing we have an option of company code and plant so in such situation how this can be created . Can i get some information or step by step guidance?

entry.title: Salesforce adapter (1.0.18) returns no result
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have an Integration flow developed on CPI tenant (apache camel version 2.24) which connects to Salesforce application via Salesforce (version 1.0.18) sender adapter. Operation type is SOQL Execute query. When this integration flow is executed, it returns no query result as shown below:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="no"?>
<QueryResult>
<done>true</done>
<totalSize>0</totalSize>
</QueryResult>

I have the same integration flow developed on another CPI trail tenant (apache camel runtime version 3.14) with Salesforce adapter version 1.0.32. When this integration flow is executed, It is returning good number data records from the same salesforce instance (as above).

Can anyone clarify why there is a difference in the behavior and it is expected? 

Regards,

Naresh Dasika

entry.title: Reprocessing Synchronous Messages in SAP PI/PO
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I'm reaching out regarding a few use cases where I need to store and reprocess synchronous messages in SAP PI/PO. While I understand this might not be the ideal approach, I'd appreciate your guidance on alternative solutions achievable within SAP PI/PO.

entry.title: SOAP Axis Adapter - How To Activate Log Viewer Trace?
entry.content:
I am developing a SOAP to AXIS scenario in SAP PI.

The Axis receiver is configured with WSS4J for SOAP signature. I need to see the SOAP Envelope after the signature has been applied, but I am not able to do it.

I have tried with XPI Inspector, Wireshark adn TCPMon.

I have seen that is possible to get really cool debug information from the Axis and XML Security methods in the NWA Log Viewer as this blog screenshots shows: SOAP(axis) receiver scenario - signature verificat... - SAP Community

But when looking for those locations in the Log Configuration, none of them are available:


Is there anything I need to do to be able to collect those logs?

entry.title: Good afternoon community,Error in integration Inbound Delivery to TM
entry.content:
Good afternoon community,

I have the following problem, a scenario in TM embedded, I create the inbound delivery and the document does not raise the TM view. I check the integration log in the program /SCMTMS/CHK_DOC_INT_INT_TM_INTEGR, and the system indicates that the control key does not exist, but I check and yes this the delivery type, shipping point, shipping condition and other correct data. I attach screenshots.

entry.title: AXIS Adapter - Edit Log Configuration Locations
entry.content:
I am following the SAP Note 1039369 FAQ XI Axis Adapter.

Q: Which components are relevant for generating a debug trace output?

I am looking to be able to trace WSS4J in an Axis scenario with XML signature. The FAQ document explains that I need to add entries to the log-configuration.xml in the Axis SDA.

However, I don't know where is that file located. I have tried placing the example file provided in the FAQ in the META-INF folder of the com.sap.aii.af.axisproviderlib.sda and redeploy it to PI, but that doens't seem to work.

Besides, the Trace Locations in the NWA seems broken:

That <unknownclass> entry is very weird but I don't really know if it was there before.

I am not able to find any proper explanation about the XML file and how to add those entries.

entry.title: while posting data from CPI to S/4 Hana cloud, the data is not being posted.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm using Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous) SOAP API from the SAP BUSINESS ACCELERATOR HUB in CPI to post data from CPI to S/4 HANA Public Cloud. I'm providing all the mandatory fields required in the API and in the response code of the "CamelHttpResponseCode" I'm getting 200.
I've also checked any error in the SOAP Error Log of the S/4 Hana public cloud and couldn't find any error for which it is not being posted.

I'm using "JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest" WSDL in my message mapping as a target but in the response i'm getting "JournalEntryBulkCreateConfirmation". So, I'm unable to identify the issue.

Thanks in Advance,

@Sriprasadsbhat , @Dan_Wroblewski , @Sookriti_Mishra, @JulianoRomanato

entry.title: how to create synchronous iflow from sap cpi
entry.content:
hi, I need to create a synchronous iflow cpi from sap via proxy.

Can anyone tell me how I can make the call synchronous? On the XI receiver channel I don't see the possibility to select "best effort"

entry.title: RFC lookup in case of backend maintenance SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are working on synchronous interface with RFC lookup(calling Function module on SAP Backend) like shown in below picture. Based on the RFC lookup output value received from SAP S4, the incoming request has to be either forwarded to system B or system C & get back the response.

This should be ideal scenario when SAP S4 is up and running like shown below. There is a mapping defined with RFC lookup in this case and this scenario works perfectly fine.

But, now in case of when SAP S4 is down during maintenance mode, the incoming request should be always forwarded to System B. In that case, we have also defined different mapping to be executed without RFC lookup & The corresponding response received from System B should be send back to System A.

Is it possible to execute one mappings when system is up and another mapping during maintenance window.

How SAP PO system will get to know when there is SAP S4 in maintenance mode?

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: Synchronous RFC call not receiving response data form PI/PO middleware
entry.content:
Hi Member's,

 I am able to send the data successfully to PI/PO system through RFC call  & from PI/PO system it is showing it has pushed the response data to ECC successfully . But in calling program I am not receiving any response instead the data which I am passing  through  RFC  (VATPOSTINGS ) is also getting cleared. 

  Request :RFC call from ECC =>  PI/PO => external system  (No issue , everything works as excepted )

  Response : external system => PI/PO => ECC ( Response from PI/PO not received  in calling program )

Not able to figure out for what reason I am not receiving the response, Please let me know if there is any thing I have to handle  additionally.

entry.title: Third party URL hitting
entry.content:
Hi team,

Actually we have one requirement I have third party URL so how to configure in sap po to get the data in sap system I checked URL in postman so i get vehicle details but through sap po how to trigger blank data like i have to hit the URL so i will get all details in sap PO if any lead would help me it would be great I m new to sap po so please it's really urgent and if any one created same scenario please share snap with me.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Salesforce OCI Integration with SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello All,

As part of one of the Integration requirement, SAP Integration Suite has to export(post/push) data to Omni Channel Inventory (OCI) Salesforce Impex Endpoint using JWT authentication mechanism. 

Salesforce Impex API- Salesforce APIs in OCI invoked to publish or extract Inventory Information.

To meet this requirement, standard Salesforce adapter (from SAP) has been used with authentication "OAuth JWT Bearer". I see the possibility of configuring URL (OCI Export endpoint) only with Type "Apex call".

When executing the integration flow it is failing with an error message-"

org.apache.camel.CamelException: {"error":"invalid_grant","error_description":"user hasn't approved this consumer"}
 
Per Salesforce consultant, there is no issues with the user role/authentication.

Can anyone please clarify if it is correct to use "Apex call" type in Salesforce adapter to export data to OCI Impex endpoint?

Regards,

Naresh Dasika

entry.title: Homologar o CTe 4.0 junto a SEF-MG.
entry.content:
Estamos homologando o CTE 4.0 junto a SEF MG e estamos recebendo o erro 599 ao emitir um CTe, apesar do xml passar nos validadores. 

O erro é semelhante ao reportado em 12802345  mas como ainda não temos o CTe 4.0 em produção estou passando por isso apenas no ambiente de homologação.  Alguém está usando o ambiente de homologação da SEF-MG para emissão de CTe poderia me confirmar se passa pelo mesmo problema?

Utilizamos o SLL-NFE, release 900 SP 0035

entry.title: Iflow HTTP Oauth authentication unsupported grant type error 400
entry.content:
hi, I created an HTTP flow with Oauth authentication but I encounter this error:

this is the iflow:

this is the security material

does anyone know what the problem could be?

entry.title: Log retention for synchronous flow not working as expected in SAP PI 7.31 Single stack
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have made changes in NWA at message retention to hold 1month of data for a synchronous flow. And we have restarted the application server. As of now its only retaining 1 flow of a synchronous flow. Its not retaining the other flow.

I am unable to understand why this is not retaining logs for both flow. Could you please help.

entry.title: Run Automatic Payment F110: Automatic Cash discount account determination - error determination SKE
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I´m facing issue running automatic payment to vendor for open item with applicable cash discount.

Message No. FZ310 In table T030, the entry "Co.Code" SKE  is missing

I already have maintained table T030 as below, but SAP still triggering same error below.

MANDTKTOPLKTOSLBWMODKOMOKBKLASKONTSKONTH
111C.CodeSKE I0 394001394001

Additionally, I also have tested changes in G/L Account Master Date in fields Tax Category and Posting without tax allowed flagging, but nothing is working.

Any ideias what should be incorrect?

entry.title: Oauth authentication integration suite
entry.content:
Hi,

can you help me use Oauth authentication on the integration suite? I created the user on the security material but I get an error.
I read that it is not supported, do you have to use a script to get the token?

 

Thank you

entry.title: SAP to PLEX MES Integration
entry.content:
Hello All,

I'm a student and new to PLEX. Working on a SAP Integration project with PLEX MES using middleware application called Mendix. Here, I wanted to know whether we can pull serial numbers from PLEX MES to SAP system or not? If yes, how & where we can do that?

Much appreciated your response and guidance🙂.
